title: inula sericophylla
intro: Inula sericophylla, also known as the Grey-leaved Inula or Yellow Inula, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Inula sericophylla are primarily attributed to its root, which contains sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. This plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Inula sericophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
